body.text: Hover highlighted course codes to see a tooltip with course information. Click on the tooltip to pin; press Escape or click elsewhere to unpin.
Use the Course Lookup above to search for any course by code, title, description keyword, or instructor name.
Configure the settings below to customize what information appears in tooltips, such as prerequisites, description, schedule, and instructors.
This extension's course and schedule data currently covers
Caltech.dev — a directory of Caltech-related tools and resources:
Donut Course Planner — Caltech's course planning tool:

runs.text: All course, schedule, and instructor data shown in this extension — in tooltips, the Course Lookup search, and course detail views — comes from Caltech's
course catalog and public schedule pages, and requires no login to view.

TQFR (Teaching Quality Feedback Report) survey results are Caltech-internal and are never scraped, stored, or displayed by this extension. When a professor's course list includes a “TQFR” link, that link only points to the official

report page — clicking it will prompt you to log in with your Caltech credentials, and only members of the Caltech community who are already permitted to view that survey will be able to see anything there.
This extension itself only ever stores TQFR
(course, term, instructor) needed to build that professor → course list — never ratings, comments, or any other survey content.
If you encounter any issues such as
missing courses, courses not being detected, or incorrect information
or you have suggestions for this extension, please contact us Varun Rodrigues at his Caltech email address.
the exact problem description, the course code in exact text format, and the URL where the issue occurred (if applicable)
To inspect this extension's code or contribute, please visit our GitHub repository
